en: lying there day after day watching people press their ugly faces in on you.
It's just... I've never talked to a snake before.
Do you talk to people often? You're from Burma, aren't you?
Was it nice there? Do you miss your family?
ko: 버마에서 왔지? 거기 좋았어? 가족이 그립지 않아?

en: I see. That's me as well.
I never knew my parents either. Mummy! Dad! Come here!
ko: 나도 그래 나도 부모님을 모르거든 엄마 아빠 이리 와봐 이 뱀이 뭘 하는지

en: You won't believe what this snake is doing!
